tasks.build:wasm:deno: rm -rf crates/blake3_wasm/pkg/deno && RUSTFLAGS='-C opt-level=3 -C target-feature=+simd128' wasm-pack build crates/blake3_wasm --scope fuzdev --target deno --release --out-dir pkg/deno && deno run --allow-read --allow-write scripts/patch_deno_compile.ts crates/blake3_wasm/pkg/deno
tasks.build:wasm:web: rm -rf crates/blake3_wasm/pkg/web && RUSTFLAGS='-C opt-level=3 -C target-feature=+simd128' wasm-pack build crates/blake3_wasm --scope fuzdev --target web --release --out-dir pkg/web && deno run --allow-read --allow-write scripts/patch_npm_package.ts crates/blake3_wasm/pkg/web
tasks.build:wasm:small: deno task build:wasm:small:deno && deno task build:wasm:small:web
tasks.build:wasm:small:deno: rm -rf crates/blake3_wasm_small/pkg/deno && RUSTFLAGS='-C opt-level=s' wasm-pack build crates/blake3_wasm_small --scope fuzdev --target deno --release --out-dir pkg/deno && deno run --allow-read --allow-write scripts/patch_deno_compile.ts crates/blake3_wasm_small/pkg/deno
tasks.build:wasm:small:web: rm -rf crates/blake3_wasm_small/pkg/web && RUSTFLAGS='-C opt-level=s' wasm-pack build crates/blake3_wasm_small --scope fuzdev --target web --release --out-dir pkg/web && deno run --allow-read --allow-write scripts/patch_npm_package.ts crates/blake3_wasm_small/pkg/web
tasks.build:component: RUSTFLAGS='-C opt-level=3 -C target-feature=+simd128' cargo component build -p blake3_component --release && mkdir -p pkg/component && cp target/wasm32-wasip1/release/blake3_component.wasm pkg/component/
tasks.clean: cargo clean && rm -rf crates/blake3_wasm/pkg crates/blake3_wasm_small/pkg pkg && rm -rf benches/results
tasks.check: deno task typecheck && deno task test:rust && deno task lint && cargo fmt --all --check && deno fmt --check
tasks.test: deno task test:deno && deno task test:deno:small && deno task test:component && deno task test:npm && deno task test:npm:small
tasks.compare:wasm: deno task build:wasm:deno && deno task test:deno
tasks.compare:small: deno task build:wasm:small:deno && deno task test:deno:small
tasks.compare:component: deno task build:component && deno task test:component
tasks.compare: deno task compare:wasm && deno task compare:small && deno task compare:component
tasks.validate:npm: deno task test:npm && deno task test:npm:small
tasks.validate: deno task check && deno task build:wasm && deno task build:component && deno task test && deno task validate:size && deno task validate:compile
tasks.bench: deno task bench:build && deno task bench:deno && deno task bench:node && deno task bench:bun && deno task bench:wasmtime:run && deno task bench:report && deno task validate:bench
tasks.bench:build: deno task build:wasm && deno task build:component
tasks.bench:wasmtime: deno task build:component && deno task bench:wasmtime:run
